metric_definition: Official pooled mPQ+ over the six classes and mean per-class R2; mPQ+ uses full 256x256 patches while R2 uses central 224x224 counts.
comparability_note: Hidden-final leaderboard scores are contextual targets. The official HoVer-Net values use the authors' public group-stratified validation fold; its downloaded checkpoint will additionally be evaluated on our split for a paired comparison.

references.name: EPFL | StarDist
references.role: final challenge leaderboard top mPQ+ reference

references.name: Pathology AI
references.role: final challenge leaderboard top R2 reference

references.name: CellViT-SAM-H
references.split: Lizard comparison; metric is mPQ, not official CoNIC mPQ+

references.name: Official HoVer-Net baseline
references.role: official public CoNIC-trained checkpoint reproducibility target
